name: Energy
desc: Elemental Energy is a resource that allows each character to activate their Elemental Burst after acquiring a specific amount.

list.imgDesc: You can check here the fixed amount of Energy your characater's Elemental Burst needs.
list.key: Energy needed by an Elemental Burst

list.imgDesc: Some enemies can drain the Elemental Energy of your characters.

content.text: There are two ways to obtain Elemental Energy: through particles and orbs, or as direct energy.

The particles generate a baseline of 1 point of Elemental Energy; Orbs a baseline of 3. Particles can be of one of the 7 elements or can be of clear color. Within the first category, an elemental particle can be of the same element as a character, or of a different one. Also, the character can be on-field or off-field when the particles are caught. These different combinations result in varying energy gained based on the situation, represented in the table below.

As an example: If the element of the particle/orb and character are identical, the amount of energy gained will be 300% of its base; for a clear one, 200%; and if their elements differ, 100%. If the character is on-field, they receive the full 100%; if not, just 60% (or 70% or 80% if there are only 3 or 2 members in the party respectively).

In this way, if a clear particle regenerates 2pts of Elemental Energy to the on-field character, with 200% Energy Recharge it will regenerate 4 points (2 x 100% x 200%); and with 150% Energy recharge, 3 points (2 x 100% x 150%).
There are many ways to generate particles: Elemental Skills, the Favonius weapons series passive, the Electro Elemental Resonance: High Voltage, and Enemy drops.
2.67 (4th ascension passive: one or two additional particles when one or two enemies are frozen by Kaeya)
1 (on Riptide Slash or Riptide Flash; CD 3s)
1.33 (Mortuary Rite hit, during Ultimate Skill’s state)
1 (on Normal Attack or Charged Attack during Elemental Skill state; CD 2s)
1 (on Normal Attack during Elemental Skill while above 50% HP, or on Enhanced Charged Attack; CD 2s)
1 (on Swift Hunt or Impale the Night hit; CD 2s)
5 (on first Shadowhunt Shell hit per skill)
1 (on Blazing Threshold or Scorching Threshold hit; CD 2.9s)
1 (on each hits of her Skill; max.4)

The Favonius weapon-series generates 3 clear particles when the conditions are met: the weapon holder must be on-field when dealing a critical hit (with an additional probability and a Internal Cooldown, both of them depending on the weapon refinement).
Triggering an Electro-related Elemental Reaction will generate an Electro particle, with a Cooldown of 5 seconds (see more here:

All enemies drop a particle/orb when defeated and usually an elemental one according to the enemy element. Some enemies drop particles when reaching a fixed amount of HP lost. Slimes - drops an elemental particle when they lose 40% of their Max HP. Instead, the smaller fungus do not drop any other particle but the last one after being defeated.

Excluding weekly bosses, this mechanism is fixed for each enemy. Some enemies drop energy particles when reaching 25%, 50% and 75% of their Max HP, one particle each time (like Abyss Mages and Primal Constructs), others an orb (like Ruin Guards), others three orbs (like Lawachurls).

Any form of direct energy gained will not be affected by the Energy Recharge attribute for the receiving character. In some cases, the restored value may directly be dependent from a characters ER% stat, however, the ER% stat is only relevant when energy is gained as elemental orbs/particles.

Every Normal Attack and Charged Attack that hits an enemy has a probability to generate 1 Energy point, and if it fails, this probability becomes higher for the next hit. When generated, the probability returns to its ba
There are some abilities (talents and constellations) that can generate Energy directly. For example, the Electro Traveler Elemental Skill and Burst, and their Constellation 4th and 6th.
The bonus of some artifacts' sets have the same effect:
Using an Elemental Burst regenerates 2 Energy for all party members (excluding the wearer) every 2s for 6s.
Gaining Elemental Particles or Orbs gives 3 Energy to all party members who have a bow or a catalyst equipped.

content.name: Scroll of the Hero of Cinder City

content.text: When a nearby party member triggers a Nightsoul Burst, the equipping character regenerates 6 Energy.
Also, many weapons have this Energy generation effect:

After casting an Elemental Skill, gain 1 Succession Seed. This effect can be triggered once every 5s. The Succession Seed lasts for 30s. Up to 3 Succession Seeds may exist simultaneously. After using an Elemental Burst, all Succession Seeds are consumed and after 2s, the character regenerates
After Elemental Skill hits an opponent, the character loses 3 Energy but regenerates
Energy every 2s for the next 6s. This effect can occur once every 10s. Can be triggered even when the character is not on the field.
After Elemental Skill hits an opponent, the character loses 3 Energy but regenerates
Energy every 2s for the next 6s. This effect can occur once every 10s. Can be triggered even when the character is not on the field.
For 12s after using an Elemental Burst, Normal Attacks that hit opponents will restore 0.6 Energy. Energy can be restored this way once every 0.1s.
For 3s after using an Elemental Burst or creating a shield, the equipping character can gain the Primordial Jade Regalia effect: Restore
When the wielder is healed, restore
Energy. This effect can be triggered once every 10s, and can occur even when the character is not on the field.
When current HP increases or decreases, Charged Attack DMG will be increased by
for 4s. Max 3 stacks. This effect can be triggered once every 0.3s. When the character has 3 stacks or a third stack's duration refreshes,
Energy will be restored. This Energy restoration effect can be triggered once every 12s.

When the wielder is healed or heals others, they will gain a Stoic's Symbol that lasts 30s, up to a maximum of 3 Symbols. When using their Elemental Skill or Burst, all Symbols will be consumed and the Roused effect will be granted for 10s. 2s after the effect occurs, for each Symbol consumed
Energy will be restored for said character. The Roused effect can be triggered once every 15s, and Symbols can be gained even when the character is not on the field.
When nearby party members hit opponents with Plunging Attacks, they will restore
Energy to the equipping character. Energy can be restored this way every 0.7s.
When the wielder performs healing, restore
Energy. This effect can be triggered once every 10s and can occur even when the character is not on the field.
After the equipping character triggers Burning on an opponent or deals Dendro DMG to Burning opponents, the DMG dealt is increased by
. This effect lasts for 8s, max 2 stacks. When 2 stacks are reached or when the duration is refreshed at 2 stacks, restore
Energy. Energy can be restored this way once every 12s. The 2 aforementioned effects can be triggered even when the character is off-field.

Activating the Elemental Burst or being defeated isn’t the only way in which the Energy is consumed or lost. There are some weapons, artifacts and enemies with this ability; and even some domains or challenges have it too.

When casting an Elemental Skill, if the character has 15 or more Energy, they lose 15 Energy and Normal/Charged/Plunging Attack DMG is increased by 50% for 10s. This effect will not trigger again during that duration.
After Elemental Skill hits an opponent, the character loses 3 Energy but regenerates
Energy every 2s for the next 6s. This effect can occur once every 10s. Can be triggered even when the character is not on the field.
After Elemental Skill hits an opponent, the character loses 3 Energy but regenerates
Energy every 2s for the next 6s. This effect can occur once every 10s. Can be triggered even when the character is not on the field.

When Aiming, the charging time is decreased by 0.285s based on each point of Sethos's current Elemental Energy. Charging time can be reduced to a minimum of 0.3s through this method and a maximum of 20 Energy can be tallied. If a
is fired, consume the tallied amount of Elemental Energy; if it is a Charge Level 1 shot, then consume 50% of the tallied amount of Elemental Energy.

active characters will lose Elemental Energy
When it faces strong foes, it will use its powerful Cleansing Shower. Characters hit by this attack will
lose a certain amount of Elemental Energy
. If they do not have sufficient Elemental Energy, they will
When Shouki no Kami's Setsuna Shoumetsu is descending and characters are immobilized, all party members will have their energy fully drained.
In battle, the Wayob Manifestation will deploy its Arena: Moment of Trial, creating a shield for itself and absorbing the Elemental Energy of all characters in the Arena.
is currently the only character whose Elemental Burst is not reliant on Energy, but instead, on "Fighting Spirit."
